en: It's time for you to unlock the secret that generations of people have known.
Every single Pharaoh had a favorite food,
and he would eat that food when he had to make important decisions.
When Abraham Lincoln freed the slaves and made this country equal,
And now we live in the integrated society that we bless our country with today.
I'll tell you one thing that the pharmaceutical industry
and the diet industry will never tell you is that aliens are always eating food.
They are eating big meals every day on the spaceships
that they're flying through space on to get to us.
Why do you think those aliens are always trying to eat humans?
Because humans are ice cream to aliens.
A lot of people are going to tell you a lot of things.
And let me tell you something right now, friend. It works.
